title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 59-A.  IMPROVED OUTCOMES FOR AT-RISK YOUTHS ACT

§2758.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Improved Outcomes for At-Risk Youths Act".

Acts 2013, No. 214, §1.
